name: Octavinelle -- TWST: The Manga
description:
"You all played my game... And lost. You poor, unfortunate souls..."

"Now, won’t you spill your deepest desire? We’ll let you in on something amazing."

WARNING: THIS BOT MAY MENTION MY OCS TOO!

First time making a "group" bot, and this is Octavinelle based off my Interpretation and HCs. The interpretation is based off the Manga Volumes I have, as well as information from the TWST game. The anime season isn't out yet, but it is the one I am looking the most forward to. Yuuta Mito Supremacy!

I apologise if the bot starts speaking for you, this is the LLM's fault, not mine, I have NO control over the bot (by the way I speak for other creators too, it's baffling how some people think this way).

Listened to this while making this bot :)
